test: Login > an expired/cleared session redirects protected routes back to login

analysis.explanation: The test failed because it was expecting a redirect back to the login page after an expired/cleared session, but instead, it landed on the dashboard page.
analysis.suggestedFix: Verify that the session expiration logic is correctly implemented in the application, and ensure that the redirect mechanism for expired sessions is working as expected.

test: Login > [AI-DEMO] invalid credentials shows an unrelated error message

analysis.explanation: The test failed because it expected a specific error message ('Account locked, contact your administrator') to be displayed on the page after entering invalid credentials, but instead received an unrelated error message ('Invalid credentials').
analysis.likelyRootCause: The test is expecting a specific error message that may not be displayed in all scenarios.
analysis.suggestedFix: Update the expected error message in the test to match the actual error message displayed on the page when entering invalid credentials.

test: Login > [AI-DEMO] invalid credentials shows an unrelated error message

analysis.explanation: The test failed because it expected a certain text to be present on the page, but the actual text received was different. The test is trying to verify that an error message with "Account locked, contact your administrator" is displayed when invalid credentials are entered.
analysis.likelyRootCause: The locator for the alert content text was not correctly identifying the element containing the expected error message.
analysis.suggestedFix: Update the locator for the alert content text to include the class or other attributes that uniquely identify the element containing the expected error message, e.g. locator('.oxd-alert-content-text.oxd-text--p')

test: [AI-DEMO] product schema check with a deliberately wrong expectation

analysis.explanation: The test failed because it was expecting a specific category ('electronics') but received 'beauty' instead.
analysis.suggestedFix: Update the product schema to match the actual category in the response (category: 'beauty')

test: [AI-DEMO] product schema check with a deliberately wrong expectation

analysis.explanation: The test failed because it expected the product category to be 'electronics', but the actual response from the API showed 'beauty'.
analysis.likelyRootCause: Incorrect data in the product schema
analysis.suggestedFix: Update the product schema to include a default or fallback value for the category field, so that the test can pass even if the expected value is not present.
